title: DVD Film Strips Cash
wikitext:
[]: DVD Film Strips= Cash             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Mon Apr 28, 2008 9:12 am [url]http://www.animenewsnetwork.com/news/2008-04-28/evangelion-film-strips-auctioning-for-up-to-y30000[/url] Evangelion Film Strips Auctioning for Up to Y30,000 posted on 2008-04-28 02:50 EDT Not-So-Daily Link of the Day: The DVDs for the Evangelion: 1.0 You Are [Not] Alone film remake just went on sale on April 25, but the film strips that come bundled with the special edition sets are already fetching online auction bids of up to 30,001 yen (about US$287) each. Each 5,985-yen (US$57) special edition set includes about five frames of film — clipped from film reels that were actually used in last year's theatrical screenings. With only about 300,000 special edition sets produced, a film strip that happens to show a popular character or scene is commanding high auction bids. As of Monday afternoon (Japan Standard Time), the highest current Yahoo! Auctions Japan bid is 30,001 yen for a film strip depicting the character Misato after she downs a can of beer. Not far behind is a 29,800 yen bid (about US$285) for a film strip (pictured at right) of the pilots Shinji and Rei just before Shinji boards the EVA-01 unit for the first time. The next highest is a 26,000-yen (US$248) film strip of a smiling Rei just after she ejects from her damaged EVA-00 unit. A film strip showing a naked Kaworu — a scene newly created for the movie remake — stands at 25,000 yen (US$239) with one day remaining in its auction. -So, to those who got their DVD already, what scene ya got?

[]:             Quote Post by Zuggy » Mon Apr 28, 2008 10:33 am The one that came with my DVD has 5 frames of this scene - It comes in a matt black stand made of card and the film appears to be in a plastic sheath. I imagine the ones of Rei smiling will be sought after.

[]:             Quote Post by AchtungAffen » Mon Apr 28, 2008 12:10 pm http://bbs15.aimix-z.com/gbbs.cgi?room=eva103 Many pics of many strips

[]:             Quote Post by Iron Rooster » Mon Apr 28, 2008 12:18 pm Dude, the guy who got the strip with Shinji jumping out of the bathroom got a good one. Feel bad for the guy who just got Japanese letters.

[]:             Quote Post by Soth » Mon Apr 28, 2008 1:31 pm *Lurker Mode Off* Mine:

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Mon Apr 28, 2008 2:27 pm Those are awesome. I've noticed though, in the pictures on the Japanese fansite (love how the Japanese call Glasses Girl Mari as such めがねっこ too), are they really that dark quality-wise? Or is it just the type of camera/whatever people used upload the pictures? (They're film strips from the shitty camrip, aren't they? ;) )

[]:             Quote Post by Apathetic Piggy » Tue Apr 29, 2008 5:58 am Iron Rooster wrote: Dude, the guy who got the strip with Shinji jumping out of the bathroom got a good one. Feel bad for the guy who just got Japanese letters.

[]:             Quote Post by Zeak » Tue Apr 29, 2008 7:53 am Thats it Im buying an offical copy now (although I was going to anyway) but that is insane. Its like Ginax is saying here have a gold mine sit on it and watch the price rise.

[]:             Quote Post by Soth » Tue Apr 29, 2008 11:21 am Sailor Star Dust wrote: I've noticed though, in the pictures on the Japanese fansite (love how the Japanese call Glasses Girl Mari as such めがねっこ too), are they really that dark quality-wise? Or is it just the type of camera/whatever people used upload the pictures?

[]:             Quote Post by AchtungAffen » Tue Apr 29, 2008 11:42 am I saw something on Japanese websites about the film being too dark and talks about a Blu ray release or something.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Wed Apr 30, 2008 4:10 pm I got a film strip of this: http://www.tesuji.org/images/rebuild_film_strip.jpg

[]:             Quote Post by slothen » Wed Apr 30, 2008 5:48 pm pretty cool guys

[]:             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Tue May 06, 2008 1:01 pm I got a film strip of Ritsuko saying they cant eject Shinji from Eva Unit 01 because the A.T. Field would collapse (when he gets shot by the 6th Angel) Only now I can't play my DVD throuhg my MacBook Pro on VLC. Anyone have a way to help me? Thanks.

[]:             Quote Post by ATField-day » Thu May 08, 2008 10:02 am /lurker My film strip is of nude Shinji opening the door on Pen-pen. It's a pretty funny one.
